untranslatable_reason: Signal requires TPO (Time Price Opportunity) counting and value area mode identification, which are market profile concepts not available in the allowed indicators list. TPO imbalance detection, mode price calculation, and directional bias from TPO asymmetry cannot be expressed using the provided indicators (price, moving averages, RSI, ATR, Bollinger, MACD, ADX, Stochastic, Donchian, Pivots, Volume Ratio, Position, Bar Properties). The core logic depends on intrabar TPO distribution data that is not supported.
translation_notes: Attempted proxy using volume increase at extremes and price position relative to SMA, but this does not capture the TPO imbalance mechanism. A proper implementation would require custom TPO profile calculation or market profile data feed not in the allowed indicator set. The signal is inherently untranslatable to the given indicator universe.
